description:
Separate input translation logic from I/O. InputTranslator takes GamepadState + config + dt and produces Vec<OutputEvent>. OutputEvent is decomposed into timed primitives (MouseDown/Up, KeyDown/Up, MoveCursor, Scroll). Emitter becomes stateless event dispatcher behind EventEmitter trait.

```mermaid
graph LR
    1[Move shared types to config] --> 2[Add InputTranslator + tests]
    2 --> 3[Refactor MouseEmitter]
    3 --> 4[Rewire poll_callback]
    4 --> 5[Test cleanup]
```
title: Extract testable InputTranslator
